title: Sales Manager Vacancy at Mahagun Group - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Sales Manager Vacancy at Mahagun Group - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
Mahagun Group has an exciting opening for a Sales Manager at our Coimbatore office. Join a company that values innovation, collaboration, and continuous learning.

About Mahagun Group:
Mahagun Group is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Manage relationships with existing customers post-purchase
• Manage RERA documentation and compliance requirements
• Achieve monthly and quarterly sales targets
• Negotiate pricing, terms, and conditions on behalf of clients
• Coordinate with architects, contractors, and project teams
• Conduct site visits and property presentations for clients
• Coordinate with legal teams for documentation and title verification

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• CA / CMA / CFA certification
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Project Management
• Proficiency in Lease Administration
• Proficiency in Investment Analysis
• Proficiency in Sales Techniques
• Proficiency in CRM Software
• Proficiency in Client Relationship Management
• Proficiency in RERA Compliance
• Proficiency in Negotiation Skills

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Referral bonus program
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Coimbatore, Tamil Nadu, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Mahagun Group!
